text.title: RAG Feature Acceptance Contract — Output Schema
text.summary: Pins the YAML shape of `acceptance-contract.yaml`. Any agent producing or modifying this file MUST satisfy this contract before commit.

forbidden.pattern: offline metric without paired online metric for the same intent
threshold value without a baseline citation in a sibling `baseline:` field or inline comment
signatures field contains "team" / "leadership" / "AI" — must be named human emails
use of BLEU, ROUGE, METEOR as the sole correctness metric (these correlate poorly with RAG faithfulness)
"good enough" / "looks fluent" / "vibe-check" appearing in sme_rubric.pass — must cite source-grounded criteria
recontract_triggers empty or "every quarter" — must be event-based, not calendar-based

allowed-transformations.transformation: Add new intents in a minor version bump (v1.2 → v1.3) with re-signature.
Tighten thresholds (raise faithfulness floor) in a patch version (v1.2.0 → v1.2.1) with PM + ML signature only; SME signature inherited.
Loosen thresholds requires full three-signature re-sign.
Adding metric pairs to an existing intent does not require resign if both PM and ML co-sign the addendum.

list.item: ≥2 intents defined with all four PM / acceptable_failure / SME / offline / online fields populated
Every offline metric has a paired online metric
Every threshold has either a baseline or PM-acceptable-error citation
signatures.pm, signatures.sme, signatures.ml_engineer are named humans with dates within the last 90 days
BLEU / ROUGE not used as sole metric

section.title: Downstream consumers

list.item: CI gate (per-PR): blocks merges where offline metrics fall below contract thresholds
Production monitor: emits PagerDuty alerts when an online metric breaches a contract floor
Quarterly recontract review: lists all features whose recontract_triggers fired

section.p: Therefore any drift between this file and the running eval / monitor is a P1 bug — the file is source of truth.
